---
title: "MAKER-X"
description: "AI-Powered Robotics · Summer 2026 · ShanghaiTech University"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div style="max-width:860px; margin:0 auto;">
    <div class="badge-pill">
      <div class="badge-dot"></div>
      Summer 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; ShanghaiTech University
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">MAKER<span class="accent">-X</span></h1>
    <p style="font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:300; letter-spacing:0.22em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
      School of Creativity &amp; Art (SCA) &nbsp;·&nbsp; School of Information Science &amp; Technology (SIST) &nbsp;·&nbsp; School of Entrepreneurship and Management (SEM) &nbsp;·&nbsp; Kedao College
    </p>
    <div class="rainbow-bar"></div>
    <p class="hero-tagline">
      You don't just <strong style="color:#FCD34D">build</strong> a robot — you conceive the idea,
      design its personality, build the electronics, and
      <strong style="color:#FCD34D">pitch it</strong>.
      Four weeks. One team. One product you own end-to-end.
    </p>
    <p style="font-size:0.9rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.38); margin-bottom:2rem; letter-spacing:0.04em;">
      你不只是在制造机器人——你要<strong style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55)">构思创意</strong>、设计个性、搭建电路，最终<strong style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55)">登台展示</strong>。
    </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- STATS STRIP -->
<div class="stats-strip">
  <div class="stat-cell">
    <span class="stat-num">4</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Weeks</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-cell">
    <span class="stat-num">12h</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Per Week</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-cell">
    <span class="stat-num">2–3</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Students / Team</span>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-cell">
    <span class="stat-num" style="font-size:1.2rem; padding-top:.4rem; display:block;">Pass / No Pass</span>
    <span class="stat-label">Grading</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## The Mission · 课程使命 {.mt-5}

Maker-X is an intensive **4-week project course** where cross-disciplinary teams build AI-powered robotic companions from scratch — hardware, firmware, personality, and pitch. Instruction in **Chinese & English**.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .card-blue}
<span class="sl" style="color:#60A5FA">01</span>
### Conceive
Identify a real user and a genuine need. Define the personality and purpose of your robot before touching any hardware.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .card-purple}
<span class="sl" style="color:#A78BFA">02</span>
### Design
Shape, sound, language, expression — every detail of the robot's soul. Prototype rapidly and iterate without fear.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .card-coral}
<span class="sl" style="color:#FB923C">03</span>
### Build
Solder, code, 3D-print, and integrate. Electronics, firmware, enclosure — one complete, working product.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
::: {.card .card-green}
<span class="sl" style="color:#34D399">04</span>
### Pitch It ★
Present your product to real university guests. A working demo, a poster, a story — your public debut.
:::
:::

:::

---

## Course Objectives · 课程目标

Maker-X is about more than building a robot. It's about becoming someone who can **think, collaborate, and create** at the intersection of technology and design.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .card-blue}
**🤝 Cross-discipline Collaboration**

Work in teams spanning engineering, design, and beyond. Learn to communicate across disciplines and ship something greater than the sum of its parts.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .card-purple}
**🧠 Confidence with AI & LLMs**

Go from curious to capable. You'll integrate large language models into real hardware — learning to prompt, tune, and deploy AI as a core part of a product.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .card-coral}
**🎨 Design Thinking in Practice**

Empathy, creativity, rapid prototyping, iteration, and communication — not as theory, but as daily practice. The product is the proof.
:::
:::

:::

---

## Who Should Join · 招生对象

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .card-green}
### 🎓 All ShanghaiTech Students

The course is open to **all students across all schools and majors**. No prior experience or knowledge in programming, design, robotics, or AI is needed.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.card .card-teal}
### 🌐 Diversified Teams

We organize groups where different skills and backgrounds complement each other — so every student can **contribute meaningfully** and learn most effectively.
:::
:::

:::

---

## Four-Week Schedule · 课程时间线

| | Week | Theme | Key Deliverable |
|---|---|---|---|
| 🔵 | [Week 1 — Conceive](week1.qmd) | User research · Concept selection · Personality brief | Concept brief |
| 🟣 | [Week 2 — Design](week2.qmd) | Prototyping · Firmware · Form & character | Working prototype |
| 🟠 | [Week 3 — Build](week3.qmd) | User testing · Refinement · 3D-print enclosure | Integrated product |
| 🟢 | [Week 4 — Pitch It ★](week4.qmd) | Demo day · Poster · Public pitch | Presentation + demo |

The course meets **twice a week** (Monday + Wednesday), with 6 periods per session — enough time to go deep, not enough time to hesitate. → [View full class schedule](schedule.qmd)

---

```{=html}
<div class="cta-band">
  <h2 style="font-family:'Audiowide',sans-serif; font-size:2rem; color:#fff; margin-bottom:.5rem;">
    Ready to build something real?
  </h2>
  <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-size:1rem; margin-bottom:.5rem;">准备好打造真实作品了吗？</p>
  <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size:0.95rem; max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 0;">
    Contact <a href="mailto:sshmueli@shanghaitech.edu.cn" style="color:#60A5FA;">sshmueli@shanghaitech.edu.cn</a> to express interest in Summer 2026.
  </p>
</div>
```
